item.title: Free SEO Tools You Need
item.author: Author
item.description: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) is crucial for any website owner or digital marketer. It helps in improving website ranking and visibility, ultimately leading to higher traffic and conversions. However, performing SEO tasks can be time-consuming and challenging, especially for beginners. Fortunately, there are many free SEO tools available that can help streamline the process and save time. In this article, we’ll explore some of the top free SEO tools available.

item.title: Beginners' Guide to SEO
item.author: Author
item.description: As more and more businesses move online, search engine optimization (SEO) has become an essential part of any online marketing strategy. However, for beginners, SEO can be a daunting and complex subject. In this guide, we will provide an overview of SEO, explain how search engines work, and outline the steps to take to optimize your website for search engines. How search engines work? Before we dive into SEO, it’s important to understand how search engines work.

item.title: How to Find Low Competition Keywords for SEO?
item.author: Author
item.description: In the world of digital marketing, finding the right keywords is crucial for attracting potential customers to your website. However, with so many businesses vying for the top spot on search engines, it can be difficult to find keywords with low competition. In this article, we’ll explore what low competition keywords are, how to find them, and whether or not you should avoid high competition keywords. What are low competition keywords?

item.title: What Are Backlinks？
item.author: Author
item.description: Backlinks are a fundamental aspect of search engine optimization (SEO). They are links from other websites that direct traffic to your website. In this article, we will explore what backlinks are, why they are important, what makes a good backlink, how to check backlinks, and how to get more backlinks. What is a backlink? A backlink, also known as an inbound link or incoming link, is a hyperlink on one website that points to another website.

item.title: Understanding the Basics of HTTPS and How to Implement It for SEO
item.author: Author
item.description: HTTP vs HTTPS: Understanding the Basics HTTP (Hypertext Transfer Protocol) is a protocol that enables the transmission of data between a web server and a client. This protocol is widely used on the internet for accessing websites, but it is not secure. Any data transmitted through HTTP is in plain text, which means that it can be intercepted and read by anyone with the necessary tools. HTTPS (Hypertext Transfer Protocol Secure), on the other hand, is an extension of HTTP that adds an extra layer of security through encryption.

item.title: What is a Sitemap?
item.author: Author
item.description: Definition and role of sitemap A sitemap is a file that you can use to provide information about the pages, videos or other files on your website, and also to illustrate the relationships between these contents. Search engines such as Google will read the sitemap to crawl the pages on your site more efficiently. The sitemap will tell search engines which pages and files on your site you think are important and will also provide important information about those files.

item.title: What does a Google Ads Specialist do?
item.author: Author
item.description: Background After graduation, I entered an Internet company responsible for overseas promotion, and after a year, I switched to be an overseas advertising specialist, and since then, I have started my road of Google advertising. I have pushed new products, been in charge of high net worth products, experienced the whole account being blocked, and recently started to learn to recruit competent subordinates. Although the market situation is not optimistic in these years, from my personal experience, from the perspective of salary and market demand, overseas advertising specialist is still a good career choice.

item.title: Create A Static Website with Hugo and Host it with Github Pages
item.author: Author
item.description: 1. Install Hugo Windows： First install choco package manager, run cmd under administrator privileges and execute the following command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy unrestricted -Command "iex ((new-object net.webclient).DownloadString('https://chocolatey.org/install.ps1'))" # Set environment variables SET PATH=%PATH%;%ALLUSERSPROFILE%\chocolatey\bin Then use choco to install hugo: choco install hugo -confirm MacOs： Use the brew command to install: brew install hugo Linux： Install using the snap command: snap install hugo To check for successful installation:

item.title: Step by Step Guide to Create a Google Ads Campaign
item.author: Author
item.description: For many Google Ads’s beginners, it will be confusing to create a new Google Ads campaign when they hope to start their digital marketing strategy. Here I would like to offer the most detailed step by step guide to create your own first campaign. Before follow the steps bellow, please make sure that you have already own a valid Google Ads account. If you do not have such qualified account, please refer to the official guide and create one.
